FundingPips 20% OFF Deal

FundingPips is offering a 20% discount on all trading challenges using code FPDAY. This promotion provides immediate savings on one of the most operationally distinctive prop firms in the industry — a firm that has disrupted the standard monthly payout model by introducing a 5-day payout cycle, giving funded traders access to their profits far faster than any traditional schedule allows. At 20% off, this is the most affordable entry point into the FundingPips ecosystem.

FundingPips is a proprietary trading firm that has positioned itself as a speed-and-transparency leader in the prop trading market. The firm built its reputation around two core differentiators: the 5-day payout cycle that pays funded traders every five business days, and a transparent, no-hidden-rules approach to their challenge structure. FundingPips has attracted a large community of traders who prioritize fast profit access and predictable trading conditions.

With code FPDAY, you receive 20% off your challenge fee across all FundingPips account tiers. Once funded, the 5-day payout cycle means you do not have to wait a full month to see your earnings — profits are accessible every five days, making FundingPips particularly attractive for active traders who generate consistent weekly returns. The 90% profit split ensures you retain the majority of every payout.

FundingPips' trading conditions are designed around a clear, no-time-limit challenge structure: you trade until you hit your profit target without any artificial deadline pressure. The 90% profit split applies from the first funded payout, and there are no consistency rules or minimum trading day requirements that could otherwise block a fast performer from completing their evaluation. The firm supports a range of forex and CFD instruments.

To claim this deal, visit FundingPips via the affiliate link above, choose your preferred challenge account size, and enter FPDAY at checkout. The 20% discount will be applied to your total immediately. After passing your challenge, configure your 5-day payout schedule in the FundingPips dashboard to begin receiving profits every five business days as a funded trader.
